mapper.sql: authorization_id, achievement_id, chain_record_id, grantor_address, grantee_address, permission_type, start_time, end_time, status, tx_hash, revoke_tx_hash, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM authorization_record WHERE achievement_id = #{achievementId} AND grantee_address = LOWER(#{granteeAddress}) AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO authorization_record( achievement_id, chain_record_id, grantor_address, grantee_address, permission_type, start_time, end_time, status, tx_hash) VALUES ( #{achievementId}, #{chainRecordId}, LOWER(#{grantorAddress}), LOWER(#{granteeAddress}), #{permissionType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime},
#{status} 'ACTIVE' , #{txHash})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM authorization_record WHERE grantor_address = LOWER(#{grantorAddress}) ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT FROM authorization_record WHERE grantee_address = LOWER(#{granteeAddress})
AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time > NOW())
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM authorization_record ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM authorization_record WHERE status = #{status}
